themes.name: Aurora
themes.author: MyMediaVault
themes.description: Soft gradient background, slightly larger font, rounded search, and a detail page with the cover on top.

themes.name: Crimson
themes.author: MyMediaVault
themes.description: A single crimson accent everywhere, with custom Movies and Music tab colours.

themes.name: Slider
themes.author: cubman3134
themes.description: A spinning EmulationStation/RetroBat-style carousel. Media types and catalogues become an infinite, box-art slider that you spin through with the arrow keys.

themes.name: Triple
themes.author: cubman3134
themes.description: A PlayStation 3 XrossMediaBar (XMB): a horizontal bar of media-type icons crossed with the active category's vertical item column, over a dark blue wave background. Fully arrow-key / controller navigable.
